articles.author: Ari Daniel
articles.title: A bug commonly sold at pet stores is helping scientists with a vexing task - NPR
articles.description: The larvae of a beetle native to South and Central America, the critters are the perfect solution to sticky problem: How to prepare an animal skeleton for scientific use.
articles.content:
For new discoveries, everyday mysteries, and the science behind the headlines, follow NPR's Short Wave podcast.
